# PRD — <Area / Module>

- **ID:** PRD-<area>-<n>
- **Status:** draft | in-review | accepted
- **Owner:** Product Manager
- **Inputs:** (links to upstream vision/roadmap artifacts)

## 1. Overview
What is this area/module, and why are we building it? One paragraph.

## 2. Goals & non-goals
- Goals:
- Non-goals (v1):

## 3. Personas
Who uses this? (e.g. AP clerk, warehouse picker, controller)

## 4. User stories / epics
As a `<persona>`, I want `<capability>`, so that `<value>`.

## 5. Functional requirements
Numbered list; each maps to a `MOD`/`ENG` artifact.

## 6. Reference model alignment (D365)
Which D365 structures/behaviors this mirrors, with links to the reference base
(`docs/domain/`). Note deliberate deviations.

## 7. Non-functional requirements
Performance, security, audit, availability relevant here.

## 8. Acceptance criteria
Checkable statements; feed QA test cases.

## 9. Dependencies & open questions
